name: Allied Cash Advance
description_short: Allied Cash Advance offers installment loans and cash advances with same-day to next-day funding at physical locations and online. They serve customers with minimal credit requirements.
description_long:
Allied Cash Advance is a storefront lending company operating physical locations across multiple states, including Arizona. The Mesa, AZ location (2706 East University Drive, Suite F9) maintains extended hours (10am-6pm weekdays, 10am-2pm Saturday) and can be reached at (480) 964-2304. The company has maintained a strong local reputation with a 4.9 Google rating across 377 reviews, with multiple customer testimonials praising staff professionalism and service quality.

The company specializes in unsecured installment loans positioned as alternatives for consumers needing quick access to funds for unexpected expenses or consolidation. They offer loan amounts and terms determined through their underwriting process, with funding available as soon as 30 minutes when using a debit card for in-store applications, or the next business day for online applications. Additionally, they provide Netspend Prepaid Mastercard accounts and retail refinancing/reload options for existing customers. The application process requires proof of income, valid government ID, an active checking account (30+ days old), and routing/account information; Arizona customers must also provide vehicle ownership proof.

Allied Cash Advance distinguishes itself through rapid funding timelines, stated willingness to consider applicants with bad or no credit, convenient in-store and online application channels, and positive customer service reviews consistently mentioning staff by name. They emphasize transparent communication of loan terms before acceptance and operate during extended retail hours to accommodate working customers. Their Pocket360 online portal and multiple application methods (online, in-store, phone where available) provide flexibility.

The company operates in the high-cost lending space with installment loan products, meaning borrowers should expect fees and interest rates determined during underwriting that may be substantially higher than traditional bank loans. While the website does not disclose specific APR rates, the company's positioning as an emergency/alternative lender suggests rates typical of the category. Customers should carefully review all proposed terms before accepting and ensure they understand repayment obligations.
address: 1820 E Ray Rd Suite A209 C, Chandler, AZ 85225

company_info.headquarters: 1820 E Ray Rd Suite A209 C, Chandler, AZ 85225

pros: Same-day funding available (30 minutes with debit card) for in-store applications, next business day for online
High Google rating (4.9/5 stars, 377 reviews) with consistent praise for staff professionalism and service quality
Extended retail hours (weekdays 10am-6pm, Saturday 10am-2pm) accommodating working customers
Will consider applicants with bad credit or no credit history during underwriting review
Multiple application channels: in-store, online, and phone options provide flexibility
Clear, transparent loan process with written terms provided before acceptance
Additional services include Netspend Prepaid Mastercard and refinancing/reload options for existing customers
cons: No APR or fee information disclosed on website; typical high-cost lending rates apply
Requires active checking account for minimum 30 days, excluding unbanked or recently-banked customers
Arizona-specific vehicle ownership requirement adds burden for state residents
Company website was under maintenance during data collection, limiting transparency
Installment loans carry interest and fees that may exceed cost of traditional bank personal loans
best_for: Consumers with poor or no credit history needing emergency funds quickly
Banked individuals facing unexpected expenses who need funding within 24 hours
Arizona residents who can provide vehicle ownership documentation
Existing customers seeking to refinance or reload current loans
diagnosis: Allied Cash Advance is best suited for banked consumers with poor or no credit who need emergency funds within 24 hours and can meet strict documentation requirements. The main caveat is that installment loans from this lender carry higher interest rates and fees than traditional bank loans, so borrowers should only use this option when the speed of funding justifies the cost.
services: Unsecured installment loans for major purchases, bill consolidation, and unexpected expenses
Online loan application with next-business-day funding
In-store loan application with same-day or 30-minute funding options
Loan underwriting and credit decision process
Netspend Prepaid Mastercard reloadable card accounts
Retail remote refinancing for existing customers
Retail reload options for current loan customers
In-store customer service for loan questions and support
